tenantNew.title: Create a new tenant
tenantNew.successDesc: The admin has been created with a temporary password.

seedDemo.label: Inject demo data
seedDemo.hint: Automatically creates 8 Ivorian employees, 3 months of payslips, absences and trainings in this tenant.

subsidiaries.intro: Default: single-country Côte d'Ivoire company. Enable this option if the company has subsidiaries in several WAEMU / non-WAEMU countries and wants centralized payroll with local declension per subsidiary.
subsidiaries.label: Multi-country company with subsidiaries
subsidiaries.hint: Enables per-country legislative packs (CI, BF, SN, ML, TG, BJ, NE…), the centralized payroll workflow draft → site RAF → central, and the "Subsidiaries & legislations" tab in tenant settings.
subsidiaries.afterCreate: Other subsidiaries can be added after creation from "Settings → Subsidiaries & legislations".

errors.slugFormat: Slug: lowercase, digits and hyphens only

subsidiaries.title: Multi-country structure
subsidiaries.hintOn: The tenant uses per-country legislative packs and the centralized payroll workflow draft → site RAF → central.
subsidiaries.hintOff: Single-country Côte d'Ivoire tenant: standard CI 2024 payroll engine, no "Subsidiaries & legislations" tab.

actions.title: Actions
actions.defaultOfflineMessage: This site is temporarily out of service. Please contact your administrator.

offlineDialog.title: Take "{{name}}" offline
offlineDialog.desc: All tenant users (subsidiaries included) will be blocked and will see this message.
offlineDialog.placeholder: Message shown to users (e.g. maintenance, contractual suspension…)

reset.repairDesc: Enter the administrator's email and name. The schema will be (re)provisioned if missing, then the admin will be created/updated with a temporary password.
reset.saveNote: Note this password now — it will not be shown again after refresh.

agencies.title: Recruitment agencies
agencies.subtitle: Agencies managing several client companies (Côte d'Ivoire).

agencyDetail.defaultOfflineMessage: This site is temporarily out of service. Please contact your administrator.

offlineDialog.title: Take "{{name}}" offline
offlineDialog.desc: The agency members will be blocked and will see this message.
offlineDialog.placeholder: Message shown to users (e.g. maintenance, contractual suspension…)
offlineDialog.includeClients: Also take the attached <0>{{count}}</0> client company(ies) offline (their users will see the same message)

modules.title: Modules
modules.subtitle: Enable or disable the modules visible to this tenant. Everything is on by default, except the CEO 360° View (opt-in).
modules.loadError: Unable to load this tenant's modules.

contracts.label: Contracts
contracts.desc: OHADA contracts (permanent, fixed-term, apprenticeship), amendments and related documents.

payroll.label: Payroll
payroll.desc: CI payroll engine, payslips, periods and closings.

absences.label: Absences & leave
absences.desc: Requests, approvals, balances and absence planning.

expenses.label: Expense reports
expenses.desc: Entry, approval and reimbursement of expense reports.

recruitment.label: Recruitment
recruitment.desc: Job offers, applications and kanban pipeline.

training.label: Training
training.desc: Catalog, sessions, enrollments and FDFP reimbursements.

cnps.label: CNPS & declarations
cnps.desc: Monthly e-CNPS declarations and annual DISA.

mobile_money.label: Mobile Money
mobile_money.desc: Salary transfer campaigns via Wave, MTN MoMo and Orange Money.

integrations.label: Connectivity & integrations
integrations.desc: Outgoing webhooks, incoming API keys and REST connectors.

ai.label: AI Assistant
ai.desc: Claude HR assistant, document generation and retention scoring.

org_chart.label: Org chart
org_chart.desc: Dynamic org chart by division/department and managerial hierarchy, auto-updated, with PDF/SVG export.

dg_view.label: CEO 360° View
dg_view.desc: Cross-functional control view reserved for the Chief Executive Officer: consolidated HR, payroll and compliance indicators. Disabled by default (opt-in) — must be explicitly enabled by the super admin.

bulk.title: Modules of the agency's tenants
bulk.subtitle: Apply the same module configuration to the client companies attached to the agency.
bulk.empty: No company attached — nothing to configure.

general.title: General settings
general.appNameHint: Shown in emails and the interface
general.allowNewTenants: Allow the creation of new tenants
general.maintenanceWarning: Warning: enabling maintenance mode will make the application inaccessible to all users.

offline.title: Taking a tenant or an agency offline
offline.defaultMessageHint: System variable: pre-fills the message shown to users when a tenant or agency is taken offline. Editable case by case at action time.
offline.requiredHint: Enabled: a tenant/agency cannot be taken offline without a message (provided or default). Disabled: the message is optional (a generic message is shown by default).

security.title: Platform security
security.mfaSuperAdminHint: Disabled: super_admins access the platform without MFA (can create tenants). Enabled: MFA must be configured before any access.
security.mfaTenantUsers: Require MFA for all tenant employees
security.mfaTenantUsersHint: Global policy. Each tenant may <0>strengthen</0> it (never relax it) from its own settings.
security.passwordMaxAgeHint: 0 = no expiration. Beyond that, the user must change it at login.
security.passwordHistoryHint: Number of recent passwords forbidden from reuse (0 = none).
security.breachCheckHint: On each login (if internet access), the password is compared — using k-anonymity, never leaving the server — against known breaches. If compromised, a change is enforced. Without internet: check skipped (non-blocking).
security.lockoutEnabled: Lock an account after too many failed logins
security.lockoutSummary: After {{attempts}} failures in {{window}} min, the account is locked for {{duration}} min (response 423). IP rate-limiting remains active as a complement; if Redis fails, lockout is skipped (fail-open).

recommendations.https: Use HTTPS in production (Let's Encrypt certificate)
recommendations.mfa: Enable MFA for all super_admin accounts
recommendations.sovereign: Sovereign CI hosting for public sector clients

notifications.title: Notifications & Email
notifications.smtpKo: SMTP not configured — emails will not be sent
notifications.supportEmailHint: Shown in emails sent to clients
notifications.supportPhoneHint: Format: +225 XX XX XX XX XX
notifications.supportWhatsappHint: Shown in tenant welcome emails · Format +225 XXXXXXXXXX
notifications.welcomeSignatureHint: Text shown at the bottom of the email sent on tenant creation
notifications.defaultSignature: The NexusRH CI team · OpenLab Consulting · Abidjan

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence — Claude AI
ai.operationalDesc: The AI assistant is available to all authorized users (admin, HR, managers)
ai.missingKeyDesc: Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in your .env to enable the AI assistant
ai.enableToggle: Enable the AI assistant in the interface

features.chat: CI HR assistant chat (CNPS, Labour Code, OHADA)

ai.modelNote: Calibrated to the Ivorian context: CI Labour Code, CNPS 2024, ITS/DGI scale, OHADA, Mobile Money CI

legal.title: Legal information — OpenLab Consulting
legal.defaultAddress: Cocody, Rivièra Faya Lauriers 8, Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire

compliance.dataLaw: Data hosted in accordance with CI law 2013-450 on personal data protection
compliance.labourCode: Compliance with the CI Labour Code (law no. 2015-532 of 20 July 2015)
compliance.disa: DISA generation compliant with law 99-477 of 2 August 1999
compliance.ohada: OHADA contracts — Revised Uniform Act on commercial law

storeLois.title: Law Store — CI 2024
storeLois.subtitle: Legal constants applied by the payroll engine. Updated on legislative changes.
storeLois.warning: <0>Important:</0> Every change is recorded in the audit logs. SMIG changes are notified to the affected tenants. Verify the legal texts before editing.

multiLeg.title: Multi-legislative — Africa coverage
multiLeg.subtitle: Per-country payroll engines. Each country has its own social rates, tax scales and legal constants.
multiLeg.onDemand: Available on request — contact OpenLab Consulting

coverage.uemoa: <0>WAEMU</0> — Côte d'Ivoire (prod), Senegal, Benin, Togo, Burkina Faso, Mali, Niger · XOF

multiLeg.architectureDesc: Each payroll engine is an independent module (<0>payroll-engine-ci</0>, <1>payroll-engine-sn</1>…). The middleware automatically resolves the right engine based on the tenant's country. Legal constants are versioned in <2>platform.legal_constants</2>.

sourcingIa.title: AI Sourcing — Configurable setup
sourcingIa.subtitle: Everything is configurable: AI models, platforms per country, system prompts, profile slider, max budget, richness weights. Changes propagate immediately (cache invalidated).

models.count: {{count}} model(s) configured. Prices in EUR per million tokens.
models.empty: No model. The system uses the default values (Claude Sonnet 4 + Mistral Large).

platforms.empty: No platform configured. The system uses the default values.

prompts.tip: <0>Tip:</0> leave empty to use the default prompt hard-coded in the service. The prompt provided here fully replaces the default prompt for the relevant model.

advanced.budgetHint: Logs a warning if a request exceeds this budget (audit_log coming). Does not interrupt the request.

legalWatch.title: Regulatory watch
legalWatch.subtitle: Automatic detection of legal article updates by AI. Each proposal is reviewed manually before replacing the published article.
legalWatch.emptyHint: Click "New proposal" to submit a text for AI analysis, or wait for the watch worker to run (daily cron).

analyzer.title: Submit a text for AI analysis
analyzer.subtitle: Claude compares the text with the current article (if provided) and proposes a structured diff.
analyzer.proposedTextPlaceholder: Paste here the full legal text to analyze (article, decree, circular…)
analyzer.contextPlaceholder: e.g. Article 36 CNPS — 2026 pension rate change

review.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Confirmed via OJ no. 123 of 12/05/2026
